identity: Human male cleric, kindly round face, short tonsured brown hair (monk-style), gentle brown eyes, fair skin, average build.
outfit: White and pale-blue layered robes with embroidered silver trim, silver holy-symbol medallion (sunburst) on the chest, rope belt at the waist. Leather sandals.
weapons: A silver-headed mace with a glowing white jewel in the head, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mace swung forward in an arcing strike, left hand open and trailing. Robes swirl with the motion.
spellStyle: East-facing. Mace held to the side, left hand raised high with a floating sunburst of soft white-gold light above the open palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Mace held across the chest horizontally with both hands, a translucent white ward forming over the body.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling on both knees, head bowed, mace fallen on the ground in front. Medallion visible, robes pooled.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm serene idle. Mace held loosely at side, free hand over the heart. Kindly expression.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Kindly face, tonsured brown hair, silver sunburst medallion clearly visible on chest.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male cleric, kindly round face, short tonsured brown hair (monk-style), gentle brown eyes, fair skin, average build.

OUTFIT: White and pale-blue layered robes with embroidered silver trim, silver holy-symbol medallion (sunburst) on the chest, rope belt at the waist. Leather sandals.

WEAPONS: A silver-headed mace with a glowing white jewel in the head, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male cleric, kindly round face, short tonsured brown hair (monk-style), gentle brown eyes, fair skin, average build.

OUTFIT: White and pale-blue layered robes with embroidered silver trim, silver holy-symbol medallion (sunburst) on the chest, rope belt at the waist. Leather sandals.

WEAPONS: A silver-headed mace with a glowing white jewel in the head, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Kindly face, tonsured brown hair, silver sunburst medallion clearly visible on chest.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
